verses.text: The altar of incense of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made. Incense altar. A place for fragrant worship.
The altar of incense of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made. Incense altar. A place for fragrant worship.
The altar of incense of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made. Incense altar. A place for fragrant worship.
The altar of incense of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made. Incense altar. A place for fragrant worship.
The altar of incense of shittim wood overlaid with gold is made. Incense altar. A place for fragrant worship.
Aaron burns sweet incense on it every morning and evening. Perpetual incense. Prayer rises continually to God.
Aaron burns sweet incense on it every morning and evening. Perpetual incense. Prayer rises continually to God.
Aaron burns sweet incense on it every morning and evening. Perpetual incense. Prayer rises continually to God.
No strange incense; once a year atonement is made on its horns. Holy. Worship keeps to God's order.
No strange incense; once a year atonement is made on its horns. Holy. Worship keeps to God's order.
At the numbering, each gives a half shekel as 'a ransom for his soul.' Ransom. Every soul is redeemed by the same price.
At the numbering, each gives a half shekel as 'a ransom for his soul.' Ransom. Every soul is redeemed by the same price.
At the numbering, each gives a half shekel as 'a ransom for his soul.' Ransom. Every soul is redeemed by the same price.
Rich and poor give alike, the atonement money for the service. Equal. None is too great or small to be redeemed.
Rich and poor give alike, the atonement money for the service. Equal. None is too great or small to be redeemed.
Rich and poor give alike, the atonement money for the service. Equal. None is too great or small to be redeemed.
A brazen laver is made for the priests to wash, lest they die. The laver. Cleansing is needed to draw near.
A brazen laver is made for the priests to wash, lest they die. The laver. Cleansing is needed to draw near.
A brazen laver is made for the priests to wash, lest they die. The laver. Cleansing is needed to draw near.
A brazen laver is made for the priests to wash, lest they die. The laver. Cleansing is needed to draw near.
A brazen laver is made for the priests to wash, lest they die. The laver. Cleansing is needed to draw near.
The holy anointing oil is compounded of choice spices. The oil. A sacred mixture sanctifies all it touches.
The holy anointing oil is compounded of choice spices. The oil. A sacred mixture sanctifies all it touches.
The holy anointing oil is compounded of choice spices. The oil. A sacred mixture sanctifies all it touches.
The holy anointing oil is compounded of choice spices. The oil. A sacred mixture sanctifies all it touches.
With it the tabernacle, vessels, and priests are anointed. Anointed. All is set apart as holy.
With it the tabernacle, vessels, and priests are anointed. Anointed. All is set apart as holy.
With it the tabernacle, vessels, and priests are anointed. Anointed. All is set apart as holy.
With it the tabernacle, vessels, and priests are anointed. Anointed. All is set apart as holy.
With it the tabernacle, vessels, and priests are anointed. Anointed. All is set apart as holy.
The oil is not to be made for common use or poured on a stranger. Reserved. The holy is not for common hands.
The oil is not to be made for common use or poured on a stranger. Reserved. The holy is not for common hands.
The oil is not to be made for common use or poured on a stranger. Reserved. The holy is not for common hands.
The sweet incense is likewise holy, not to be made for oneself. Set apart. God's worship is unique to Him.
The sweet incense is likewise holy, not to be made for oneself. Set apart. God's worship is unique to Him.
